positive: A vibrant cyberpunk cityscape at night, viewed from a rainy street corner. Neon signs reflect on wet pavement, flying drones illuminate towering skyscrapers, deep blues, electric pinks, and cyan dominate the palette. Cinematic, highly detailed digital painting, wide aspect ratio.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, soft lighting
